signals.label: price above MA20 and MA50 — short-term bullish
price below MA100 and MA200 — medium/long-term bearish
MACD histogram positive and expanding — bullish momentum
price at 61.8% Fibonacci retracement ($144.36) — decision zone
declining volume on rally — distribution caution
weekly downtrend from $207.52 ATH still dominant
earnings event dominates — binary outcome reduces chart reliability

entry_zones.scenario: beat — pre-earnings long, add above $156 on gap confirmation
inline — buy pullback to 61.8% Fib / flag support post-earnings
miss — mean-reversion bounce at April gap-fill / prior support

notes.indicator_precision: all indicator values are estimated from price history reconstruction; label as (est.) when citing
notes.key_observation: current price $144.08 is within $0.28 of the 61.8% Fibonacci retracement ($144.36) of the full $105.32-$207.52 swing — the most precise and actionable technical level ahead of earnings
notes.ma_note: MA values estimated; actual MA50 likely $133-140, MA200 likely $160-170 given price history from Nov 2025 ATH

earnings.iv_crush_warning: buying long options pre-earnings at elevated IV is high-risk; prefer defined-risk spreads
